title: Identify methodological limits
subtitle: Explain how a study design shapes what we can know.
overview: Name sample size, context, measurement, and time limits.

Module: Advanced Source Synthesis. C1 Med develops sustained independent argument, sophisticated source synthesis, editorial revision, professional authority, complex social reasoning, and controlled advanced output.

sections.title: C1 Med focus
rows: Name sample size, context, measurement, and time limits.
说出样本量、语境、测量方式和时间限制。
Taken together, these sources suggest a pattern rather than a single answer.
合在一起看，这些资料提示的是一种模式，而不是单一答案。
Explain one research limit in plain English.
用简单英语解释一个研究局限。
Because the study follows people for only six months, it cannot prove a long-term effect.
因为这项研究只追踪人们六个月，它不能证明长期影响。

items.en: Name sample size, context, measurement, and time limits.
items.zh: 说出样本量、语境、测量方式和时间限制。

items.en: Taken together, these sources suggest a pattern rather than a single answer.
items.zh: 合在一起看，这些资料提示的是一种模式，而不是单一答案。

items.en: Because the study follows people for only six months, it cannot prove a long-term effect.
items.zh: 因为这项研究只追踪人们六个月，它不能证明长期影响。

items.en: I will make the reasoning explicit instead of relying on impressive vocabulary.
items.zh: 我会把推理说清楚，而不是依赖华丽词汇。

items.en: A C1 Med answer should sustain a line of thought across several connected moves.
items.zh: C1 Med 回答应该能通过几个相连动作维持一条思路。

items.en: If the idea becomes dense, I will slow down and give the listener a clear route.
items.zh: 如果想法变得密集，我会放慢，并给听者一条清楚路线。

items.en: I can revise for argument, evidence, rhythm, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以从论证、证据、节奏和个人声音上修改。

items.en: This lesson is finished only when I can use the move in an unfamiliar topic.
items.zh: 只有当我能在陌生话题中使用这个动作时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain one research limit in plain English.
lines.zh: 用简单英语解释一个研究局限。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Because the study follows people for only six months, it cannot prove a long-term effect.
lines.zh: 因为这项研究只追踪人们六个月，它不能证明长期影响。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the argument more sustained and more independent?
lines.zh: 你能让这个论证更持续、更独立吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will connect the claim, evidence, limitation, and implication without losing the thread.
lines.zh: 可以。我会把观点、证据、局限和影响连起来，同时不丢主线。

items.en: Explain one research limit in plain English.
items.zh: 用简单英语解释一个研究局限。

items.en: Answer once in ten to twelve sentences with a sustained line of thought.
items.zh: 用十到十二个句子回答一次，保持一条持续的思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Med move: evaluate evidence, compare assumptions, refine a concept, or revise the tone.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Med 动作：评价证据、比较假设、细化概念或调整语气。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite one section for clarity and one section for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后为清晰度重写一部分，为风格重写一部分。

items.en: Keep the final version as a model for C1 Hi practice.
items.zh: 把最终版本保留下来，作为 C1 Hi 练习的模板。
